title: FUNKIN Cocktails Ready to Drink Blue Raspberry Martini Bottle | Just Chill & Serve | Vibrant & Fruity Flavour | Pre-Mixed & Ready to Drink Cocktails, Great-Tasting Bar-Quality Mix | 10% ABV | 700ml
features: Blue Raspberry Martini for a Bold & Beautiful Beverage: A vibrant twist on a classic, our pre mixed cocktail blends sweet raspberry flavour with smooth vodka for a nostalgic, party-ready serve—just chill, shake, and pour to enjoy!

Just Chill & Serve—No Prep, All Pleasure: Forget the mixers and measuring. This pre-mixed & ready to drink cocktail mix is perfect for spontaneous celebrations or laid-back evenings. Unscrew, pour, and enjoy premium cocktails made simple.

Bar-Quality Taste with 10% ABV in Every Pour: Experience a smooth, satisfying kick with every glass. At 10% ABV, this ready made cocktail offers a true cocktail bar experience without the shaker or the wait—ideal for hosting or sipping solo.

Pair with Party Snacks for Maximum Nostalgia: Whether it’s salty crisps, sweet treats or retro bites, our Blue Raspberry Martini cocktail drink pairs effortlessly with your favourite party snacks. It’s fun, fruity, and always ready to go.

Vegan Friendly & Gluten Free with Real Fruit Flavour: Crafted with real ingredients and free from animal products or gluten, FUNKIN's cocktail drink delivers uncompromised flavour and texture. It's suited to a wide range of lifestyles and dietary needs.
description: Product Description Funkin Cocktails Blue Raspberry Martini | Easy Ready to Drink Pre-Mixed | 10% ABV | 70cl Manufacturer Contact Information Funkin UK Ltd, 122 Arlington Rd, London, NW1 7HP

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Store in a cool and dry place. Best before end: See base. Once opened, refrigerate and use within 7 days.
